chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CONST. PETITION No. D-1737 OF 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Main Case 04.10.2021 Mr. Dhani Bux Otho Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, AAG..... Counsel for the Petitioner, on instructions, does not press the instant petition for the time being as the Petitioner wants to approach the Cane Commissioner Sindh and other forums for redressal of his grievance. Order accordingly. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Amjad/PS
